headline: FitLife Brands Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: FitLife Brands (NASDAQ:FTLF) reported sharply higher first-quarter 2026 revenue, driven by the acquisition of Irwin, while profitability declined as the company absorbed lower Irwin margins and higher acquisition-related expenses.
